Subject: Your Life is in Danger - Pay the Ransom or Face Consequences

Dear [Name],

I hope this email finds you well. Unfortunately, it is not a pleasant message that I have to send. However, circumstances have arisen where your life is now at stake unless you comply with my demands.

You are being held captive by an organization that values money above all else. In order to secure your release, you must pay a substantial ransom within the next 48 hours. Failure to do so will result in severe consequences, including but not limited to death.

We have taken every measure to ensure your safety and security during this ordeal
